projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts / doesn't deliver frames. Likely needs chip-variant-specific init.
blockers: RTL8168 RX blocked — chip fires zero RX interrupts, DHCP times out

projects.name: Wraith Browser
projects.handoff_excerpt: Hosted Corpo API live at https://wraith-browser.vercel.app and direct VPS at 207.244.232.227:8080. AGPL repo + proprietary api-server tier both deploying clean. Growth-prep artifacts staged. FR queue cleared except for cross-repo FR-4.
blockers: FR-4 cross-repo wraith-transport bridge pending ClaudioOS session

projects.name: Job Hunter MCP
projects.handoff_excerpt: Orchestrator live, 30min poll + 2h scrape, sniper mode. Priyasha S. client call status — Matt handled scheduling manually.

projects.name: The Right Wire
projects.handoff_excerpt: Healthy. No code changes this session. Warm-account post #2 went out under @therightwireai (naval/ARG-spotting angle). Documented an X automation gotcha (Lexical editor). Curated public-apis catalogue against TRW's intel surface.

projects.name: PerformanceTracker
projects.handoff_excerpt: APP RUNNING ON iPhone 17 Pro Max — Abacus wired — health pipeline finalized. Dashboard shows seeded P1/P2/P3 trajectory + live Abacus finance. Revenue tab pulls bank-feed transactions across All Orgs / per-org with 7/30/90/365d window picker.
milestones_hit: App live on iPhone 17 Pro Max
